scope: Reuse persona_candidates_v1 harness, wrap into ResearchCandidatePacketV1, Skeptic + Meta-Governor gating, research_queue enqueue.

agents.name: persona_challenger_agents
agents.behavior: Calls build_persona_candidate_packet for each persona spec; never invents new research vocabulary.

agents.name: skeptic_falsification_analyst_agent
agents.behavior: Adds blocking_reason 'no_counter_interpretation' if countercase is empty.

agents.name: meta_governor_agent
agents.behavior: Dedupes on (persona, horizon, universe, intended_overlay_type); rate-limits to 3 per cycle; wraps into ResearchCandidatePacketV1 and enqueues research_queue.

coverage: skeptic adds blocking_reason when countercase empty, leaves alone otherwise
meta-governor caps enqueued count at max_per_cycle
research packet retains persona packet inside payload
blocking_reasons propagate from persona to research packet
